description: elchi-shield (Envoy ext_proc API-security/WAF sidecar) — every shield metric family: traffic decisions, per-engine findings, latency, body inspection, resilience, config reloads, audit pipeline, and process runtime.

panels.description: Total requests inspected per second across the selected shield instances.
panels.title: Requests / s

panels.description: Requests blocked per second (either direction).
panels.title: Blocked / s

panels.description: Share of inspected requests that were blocked.
panels.title: Block ratio

panels.description: Concurrent ext_proc streams currently open.
panels.title: Streams in flight

panels.description: Binary version (build_info).
panels.title: Shield build

panels.description: OWASP CRS (coraza-coreruleset) version compiled into the shield binary.
panels.title: Embedded CRS

panels.description: Per-second allow/block decision rates.
panels.title: Allowed vs blocked

panels.description: Detect/shadow mode would-block events — the request was still allowed.
panels.title: Detect & shadow (would-block, allowed)

panels.description: Per-Envoy-listener (node id) request rate.
panels.title: Requests by listener

panels.description: Which engine produced each enforced block (findings_total{action=block}).
panels.title: Blocks by engine

panels.description: Non-enforced findings by engine — tune here before switching a policy to block.
panels.title: Detections by engine (detect + shadow)

panels.description: Total findings per engine over the dashboard time range.
panels.title: Top engines (findings, time range)

panels.description: ext_proc per-message processing latency.
panels.title: Processing latency quantiles (all phases)

panels.description: Request/response header and body phase p99 — body phases include engine (WAF) work.
panels.title: p99 latency by phase

panels.description: Slowest pipeline stages — which inspector/engine costs the most.
panels.title: p99 latency by stage (top 10)

panels.description: Stage results by action (continue/block/detect/…).
panels.title: Stage actions

panels.description: Executions per second per pipeline stage.
panels.title: Stage throughput (top 10 stages)

panels.description: Volume of request/response body bytes run through the body pipeline.
panels.title: Body bytes inspected / s

panels.description: Bytes currently buffered across all streams — bounded by --max-inflight-body-bytes.
panels.title: In-flight buffered body bytes

panels.description: Bodies truncated at intake (per_request_cap / inflight_budget) — truncated bodies are blocked.
panels.title: Body budget rejections

panels.description: Bodies rewritten by DLP redaction.
panels.title: DLP body mutations / s

panels.description: Stream-level processing errors (panics recovered, transport errors).
panels.title: ext_proc errors / s

panels.description: Per-request policy deadline hits.
panels.title: Timeouts / s

panels.description: How errored requests were resolved per the policy fail posture.
panels.title: Fail-open vs fail-close

panels.description: Content hash of the active config snapshot.
panels.title: Active config version

panels.description: Seconds since the active snapshot was built.
panels.title: Config age

panels.description: Rejected reloads since the last success — alert when > 0 persistently.
panels.title: Consecutive reload failures

panels.description: Wall-clock time of the last accepted config.
panels.title: Last successful reload

panels.description: Accepted vs rejected reload attempts.
panels.title: Config reloads

panels.description: 1 when an async audit sink (ClickHouse/OTLP) is active.
panels.title: Audit enabled

panels.description: Buffered audit events awaiting export (bounded, drop-on-full).
panels.title: Audit queue depth

panels.description: Events dropped by the bounded queue + sink write failures (e.g. unreachable ClickHouse).
panels.title: Audit drops & export errors

panels.description: The canonical goroutine-leak signal per shield instance.
panels.title: Goroutines

panels.description: Process RSS and Go heap in use.
panels.title: Memory (RSS + heap)

panels.description: CPU cores consumed per shield instance.
panels.title: CPU

panels.description: File descriptors + worst-case GC pause.
panels.title: Open FDs & GC pause p-max

title: Elchi Shield (WAF)
